hero_badge: #1 Bike Sharing in Ho Chi Minh City
hero_desc: A network of over 50 stations covering all of HCMC. Book a bike in 30 seconds — no cash, no traffic jams.
feat_desc: Designed for the busy city lifestyle — fast, green, and effortlessly convenient.
feat_1_desc: Book a bike in under 30 seconds. Scan, ride, done. No dedicated app required.
feat_2_desc: 50+ stations from District 1 to District 12, Thu Duc and beyond. Always a bike nearby.
feat_3_desc: Vehicle insurance + real-time GPS tracking. Honest pricing, zero hidden fees.
feat_4_desc: Standard bike from 500 VND/min. E-scooter from 1,500 VND/min. Always cheaper than taxis.
feat_5_desc: Each ride saves ~200g of CO₂ vs. a motorbike. Together, we're greening Saigon.
feat_6_desc: Live support agents around the clock. Issue on the road? We're there in 15 minutes.
steps_1_desc: Open the map, pick the nearest station. Check vehicle count and type availability.
steps_2_desc: Select Standard or Electric. Confirm payment. Your bike unlocks immediately.
steps_3_desc: Drop off at any station. The system auto-bills you and emails a receipt.
stations_desc: Pick a station, pick a ride, start your journey
stations_empty_desc: Try searching with a different keyword
testi_1_text: I use SaigonRide to commute every day. It saves me 70% compared to Grab and I never worry about traffic jams anymore. Absolutely love it!
testi_2_text: Amazing service! Rented an e-bike for 3 days exploring Saigon. Super easy to use, very affordable. Highly recommend to any visitor!
testi_3_text: Students need to save money. SaigonRide lets me get to class for just a few thousand VND each day. It's genuinely great!
cta_desc: Sign up free and get 15% off your first 3 rides.
footer_brand_desc: Smart bike & e-scooter sharing network across Ho Chi Minh City. Green, convenient, and modern — move your way.
guide_subtitle: Your comprehensive guide to using SaigonRide
guide_step1_desc: SaigonRide has over 50 stations distributed across Ho Chi Minh City. You can easily locate the nearest station using our Station Search map on the homepage.
guide_step1_li1: Check the real-time availability of bicycles and e-scooters.
guide_step1_li2: View the battery percentage of e-scooters before heading to the station.
guide_step1_li3: Ensure the station is marked as "Normal" or "Full" to guarantee a ride.
guide_step2_desc: Once you arrive at the station, choose between our standard bicycles (for exercise and short trips) or electric scooters (for fast, effortless commuting).
guide_step2_li1: Click the "Standard" or "Electric" button on the station card to proceed to checkout.
guide_step2_li2: Review the pricing (500đ/min for Standard, 1.5kđ/min for Electric).
guide_step2_li3: Confirm your rental and the vehicle will automatically unlock.
guide_step2_alert: Make sure to inspect the vehicle quickly before riding. Start your trip with peace of mind!
guide_step3_desc: Enjoy your ride! When you are finished, you can return the vehicle to any SaigonRide station, it doesn't have to be the one you started from.
guide_step3_li1: Park the vehicle securely in an available slot at the destination station.
guide_step3_li2: Open the app/website and click "End Trip" on your active rental.
guide_step3_li3: The system will calculate the final fare based on your total riding time.
modal_qr_desc: Please place the QR code in the center of the frame
modal_camera_error: Camera Error: Please ensure you have granted permission and no other app is using the webcam.
modal_conn_error_desc: Cannot retrieve data right now. Please try again later.
modal_avail_desc: List of vehicles currently available at the station.
modal_no_vehicles: Sorry, this type of vehicle is currently unavailable at this station.
about_subtitle: Built by young people who love Saigon, we solve urban mobility the greenest way possible.
about_mission_desc1: SaigonRide was founded with a simple mission: provide smart, eco-friendly urban transport for the people of Ho Chi Minh City.
about_mission_desc2: Every bike or e-scooter ride saves around 200g of CO₂ compared to a regular motorbike. With thousands of rides per day, we are creating real, measurable change for our city together.
about_team_subtitle: Young people passionate about tech and the city of Saigon
about_val1_desc: Every decision we make is guided by reducing CO₂ emissions and protecting Saigon's environment.
about_val2_desc: Clear pricing, no hidden charges. Your data is protected end-to-end with bank-grade security.
about_val3_desc: Unlock a vehicle in 10 seconds. Automatic billing. No cash, no dedicated app.
about_val4_desc: 5% of all revenue is donated to the HCMC Urban Green Tree Fund.
about_cta_desc: Join thousands of riders helping make Saigon greener every day.
faq_subtitle: Can't find an answer? Call our hotline 0932 013 424 or email us anytime.
faq_q1: Do I need to create an account?
faq_a1: Yes, you need a free SaigonRide account. It takes about 1 minute with just your email and ID/passport. Once registered, you can rent immediately.
faq_q2: How long can I rent a vehicle?
faq_a2: There is no time limit. Pricing is calculated per minute from the moment you unlock the vehicle until you return it. Standard bike: 500 VND/min. E-scooter: 1,500 VND/min.
faq_q3: Can I return the vehicle to a different station?
faq_a3: Absolutely! You can return to any SaigonRide station in the city — not just your starting point. This is our most-loved flexibility feature.
faq_a4: We support Visa/Mastercard, MoMo, ZaloPay, VNPay, and Internet Banking. Payment is processed automatically when your ride ends — no cash needed.
faq_q5: How do I receive my 15% first-ride discount?
faq_a5: The discount is automatically applied to your first 3 rides after creating a new account. No promo code needed — the system handles it all.
faq_q6: Can I get a refund if I cancel a ride?
faq_a6: If you cancel within the first 2 minutes of unlocking, you get a full 100% refund. After 2 minutes, the elapsed time is billed normally.
faq_a7: Yes. All vehicles carry basic accident insurance. E-scooters also include physical damage coverage for traffic accidents.
faq_q8: What battery level is required for an e-scooter?
faq_a8: The system only allows rentals when the battery is at 20% or above, ensuring you have enough charge for your journey. Live battery level is shown on the station page.
faq_q9: What if my vehicle breaks down?
faq_a9: Call our hotline 0932 013 424 or report the issue in-app. Our team will be on-site within 15 minutes. Billing stops from the moment you report the issue.
faq_q10: What do I do if I forget my password?
faq_a10: Click 'Forgot password?' on the login page, enter your email, and we'll send a reset link within 2 minutes.
